extras.content: it is/was essential that... 后接的从句用虚拟语气。

extras.title: continuous, continual
extras.content: I've been working for 14 continuous hours and got so tired, but still there are continual interruptions. 我连续工作14小时，已经感到很疲惫了，但仍不断有人来打扰我。 注意:continuous 指某事连续发生，中间无间歇;continual 指有间歇性的连续，常指恼人的连续
avoid 后接名词或动名词。
owing to 由于，因为 The flight was delayed, owing to...

senses.example: I only had time to pack the bare essentials.
senses.example_zh: 我只来得及打包最基本的用品。

entries.mnemonic: con(with)+tin(保持)+ual→一直保持着的→不停的

senses.example: Recently the young couple have continual arguments with each other for trifles.
senses.example_zh: 近来这对年轻夫妇为了一些小事接连不断地发生争吵。

senses.example: The brain needs a continuous supply of blood.

senses.def_en: to officially stop sth. from continuing, esp. for a short time
senses.example: Sales of this drug have been suspended until more tests have been performed. // He was suspended from playing football for a year after calling the referee names.
senses.example_zh: 这种药品在完成进一步的检验之前暂停销售。// 在辱骂裁判后，他被禁赛一年。

senses.example: The lamp was suspended from the ceiling.

derivatives: suspension n. 暂停;悬架;悬,吊

senses.example: Suspense adds interest to a story.
senses.example_zh: 故事中的悬疑情节更加引人入胜。

senses.example: bring to a halt // The car came to a halt just in time to prevent an accident.
senses.example_zh: 使停止 // 汽车及时停下，避免了一场车祸。

senses.example: No one can halt the advance of history. // The parade halted by a busy corner.
senses.example_zh: 谁也阻挡不了历史的前进。// 游行队伍在一个热闹的拐角处停下了。

derivatives: halting a. 踌躇的,欲言又止的

senses.def_en: to stop doing sth. or stop happening
senses.example: The factory ceased production for lack of capital. // It rained all day without ceasing.
senses.example_zh: 工厂由于缺乏资金而停产了。// 雨不停地下了一整天。

derivatives: ceaseless a. 不停的,不断的

senses.def_en: to drive away (as if) by force
to cause sb. to feel disgust
senses.example: Her heavy make-up and cheap scent repelled him.
senses.example_zh: 她的浓妆和廉价香水味使他感到厌恶。

senses.def_en: to forbid by law or rule
senses.example: The government introduced a law to prohibit tobacco commercials on TV.
senses.example_zh: 政府采用新法律来禁止电视上播放烟草广告。

senses.example: It is difficult to avoid an arrow in the dark.
There's still over $100 owing to the bank.
